questionHtml: Outline why TMS (tetramethylsilane) may be added to the sample to carry out 1H NMR spectroscopy and why it is particularly suited to this role.
markschemeHtml:
acts as internal standard

OR

acts as reference point

 

one strong signal

OR

12 H atoms in same environment

OR

signal is well away from other absorptions

 

Accept “inert” or “readily removed” or “non-toxic” for M1.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Outline why TMS (tetramethylsilane) may be added to the sample to carry out 1H NMR spectroscopy and why it is particularly suited to this role.
